Title: ST_SRID
Description: returns SRID of shape's spatial reference system or 0 for shape on plane.
Returns the SRID of a geometry.
Examples:
SQL>SPARQL
SELECT (bif:ST_SRID (?geo))
WHERE
  {
    ?m geo:geometry ?geo .
  }
LIMIT 10;
callret-0
INTEGER
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
 4326
No. of rows in result: 10
SQL>select ST_SRID( st_point (10, 30));
callret

 4326
